slides.css: .cover-layout { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 120px 88px; } .cover-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; z-index: 1; } .cover-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(26,26,26,0) 0%, rgba(26,26,26,0.95) 100%); z-index: 2; } .cover-content { position: relative; z-index: 3; color: white; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:32px; } .tag-wrap { display:inline-block; } .tag { border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--color-accent); text-transform: uppercase; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .headline { font-size: 110px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.04em; margin: 0; text-transform: uppercase;} .sub-desc { font-size: 40px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); line-height: 1.5; max-width: 800px; }

slides.html:
01.

Design is not
just what it
looks like.

디자인은 단순히 보이는 것을 넘어 어떻게 동작하는가에 대한 고민입니다. YFC는 아름다운 프로덕트를 만드는 청년 창업가들의 커뮤니티입니다.
slides.css: .text-first-layout { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .bg-blob { position: absolute; right: -200px; top: -100px; width: 800px; height: 800px; opacity: 0.08; filter: blur(60px); z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; } .content-box { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 40px; } .section-number { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-accent); letter-spacing: 0.1em; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-accent); display: inline-block; padding-bottom: 8px; align-self: flex-start; } .title-grad { font-size: 100px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.03em; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1A1A1A 0%, #666666 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; margin: 0; } .body-text { font-size: 44px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--color-text-secondary); max-width: 850px; } .theme-dark .title-grad { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #AAAAAA 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }

slides.html:

스타트업의 성패는
결국 프로덕트의 디테일과

Youth Founder Club Core Insight
slides.css: .glass-layout { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .glass-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; z-index: 1; } .content-wrapper { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 0 88px; width: 100%; } .glass-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(50px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(50px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); border-radius: 40px; padding: 80px 64px; box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .quote-icon { font-size: 140px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--color-accent); line-height: 0.8; font-family: serif; margin-bottom: 24px; opacity: 1; } .quote-text { font-size: 52px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.45; color: #1A1A1A; margin: 0 0 64px 0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .author-block { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .author-img { width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); flex-shrink: 0; } .author-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .name { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 800; color: #1A1A1A; } .role { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #333333; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; }

slides.css: .cta-layout { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--color-accent); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; } .bg-pattern { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; } .cta-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 0 88px; width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; gap: 40px; } .tag-wrap { display:inline-block; } .tag-dark { border: 2px solid rgba(26,26,26,0.8); border-radius: 999px; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: #1A1A1A; text-transform: uppercase; } .cta-title { font-size: 120px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: #1A1A1A; margin: 0; } .cta-desc { font-size: 44px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(26,26,26,0.8); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; } .cta-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; background: #1A1A1A; color: white; padding: 24px 48px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 32px; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); transition: transform 0.2s; }
